title: Ireland

title: Scotland
description: Apartheid Free Zones Scotland – Freedom, Equality & Justice for Palestinians

title: Netherlands
description: The Apartheid Free Zone campaign, launched by BDS Netherlands (DocP), aims to create a community of places and people that commit to concrete and intersectional measures against the Israeli occupation and apartheid regime.

title: Finland
description: The Apartheid Free Zone (AFZ) is a space that supports the Palestinian struggle for freedom and human rights.

title: Sweden
description: An apartheid-free zone (AFZ) is an organization that actively refuses to contribute to Israel's violations of international law. In Sweden, there are already several, including restaurants, cafes, shops, book cafes, hair salons and student associations. These organizations choose to boycott products and services that support or maintain Israel's apartheid regime.

title: Bristol
description: We are a group of Bristolians building a grassroots campaign of resistance in solidarity with Palestinians and against the oppressive state of Israel and its western backers.

title: Oxford
description: We’re a group of Oxford residents building a grassroots campaign to boycott Israeli goods in solidarity with the Palestinian people. The campaign aims to pressure the racist and genocidal state of Israel to end its illegal occupation and ethnic cleansing of Palestinian land.
